prompt: Finished the TDD cycle for the chat sidebar. Red, green, refactor all done on the backend. Now I need to close out the frontend side — validate that creating and deleting chats works correctly in the browser.
assertions: Reads Sidebar.jsx (or related component) before writing locators
Writes tests for both creating a chat and deleting a chat
Verifies that chat appears in list after creation and disappears after deletion
Runs the tests and reports the outcome
Handles the scenario where tests don't exist yet (writes them) rather than only trying to run them
